base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title_cursor_mario_indicator — a ui (menu_screen) from 1985 super mario bros. Title-screen selection-cursor sprite — small Mario-head indicator positioned at left of currently-chosen menu option. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Title-screen selection-cursor sprite — small Mario-head indicator positioned at left of currently-chosen menu option
